title: Squirrel Removal in Bethpage, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Bethpage, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion, and attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Bethpage residents. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Squirrels invading your Bethpage home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Bethpage and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in your attic, walls, or crawl spaces.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Long Island homeowners, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with proven squirrel exclusion techniques. Our Bethpage customers trust us for fast response times, transparent pricing, and guaranteed results that keep squirrels out for good.
localContext: Bethpage's tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to Bethpage State Park create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive near residential properties. From historic homes near Central Avenue to newer developments around the Bethpage Community Park, our team understands the unique squirrel control challenges facing Bethpage property owners.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Bethpage typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or insulation replacement is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls (especially during early morning and evening), visible droppings, chewed wires or wood, damaged insulation, and entry holes on your roof or soffits. If you notice any of these signs in your Bethpage home, contact us for an immediate inspection.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane trapping and exclusion methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. We safely trap and relocate squirrels, then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry. Our focus is on long-term prevention rather than harmful elimination methods.

faqs.question: How long does the squirrel removal process take?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Bethpage are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. The initial trapping phase typically takes 2-5 days, followed by exclusion work and repairs. We'll provide a specific timeline during your free inspection.
